Component BlobStore API.description: As a developer working on Apache jclouds, your task is to understand the design decisions behind the BlobStore API component. You want to study how BlobStore presents a portable storage abstraction across providers and understand the underlying architectural structure, tradeoffs, and implementation choices.

question1.description: What are the components and connectors of BlobStore API, and what rationale is given for those architectural choices?

question2.description: Which quality attributes are considered in the design of BlobStore API?

question3.description: What architectural tactics or patterns are used in BlobStore API to satisfy those quality attributes?

question4.description: Which technologies, libraries, or mechanisms are used in BlobStore API, and what rationale is given for selecting them?
